== Notes for [[Item:Q85191|Q85191]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3145CA0FA1EFBC189822EF79916C57A6
geni:4594264927350022314

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
